name: io.github.bdog720/oraclarr
title: Oraclarr
description: Read-only diagnostic MCP server for a self-hosted arr stack (Sonarr, Radarr, Prowlarr & more).

environmentVariables.name: ORACLARR_CONFIG
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to your config.yaml (arr service URLs + ${ENV} secret refs). See the repository README for the format.
